description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages named externalbuild and externalpostbuild and a GIT_STRATEGY variable set to none. Add four buildbot jobs—buildbot/build_debian, buildbot/build_fedora, buildbot/build_macosx, and buildbot/build_mingw32—each assigned to the externalbuild stage, limited to the external trigger, and executing the single command /bin/true. Add a buildbot/post_build job in the externalpostbuild stage, also limited to the external trigger, that runs /bin/true. No images, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
